title: Remove kpod rename
body: Libpod containers are immutable once created. They cannot be renamed after created. As such remove kpod rename.

comments.body: @rhatdan PTAL. We can continue to support this, but it would be a lot of work for not much gain. I'd prefer to just yank it out until someone absolutely requires it.
I'll let @rhatdan make the go/no go decision on this.  If we do this, you might want to yank out the bash completions stuff too.  Otherwsie LGTM.
I have no problem yanking this, but I agree get rid of all of it.  Remove from bash completions.

:pushpin: Commit 188df98 has been approved by `baude`
